purpose: Single MAS-owned next-action envelope compiled from a stage terminal outcome before OPL transport or owner callable dispatch. It prevents exact work-unit ids, read models, queues, attempts, delivery mirrors, or materializer registries from becoming competing next-action authorities.
machine_boundary: Only MAS compiles NextActionEnvelope from StageOutcome/StageTerminalDecision. OPL consumes the envelope as runtime transport intent and returns TransitionReceipt. OPL must not infer medical quality or stage completion from queues, attempts, provider completion, or read-model status.

identity_policy.idempotency_key_role: runtime and owner callable replay identity
identity_policy.exact_work_unit_id_role: provenance and currentness only, never authority

default_projection_policy.paper_mission_inspect: Project the current NextActionEnvelope as the only default next action.
default_projection_policy.study_progress: Project the current NextActionEnvelope as current owner/action. Legacy current_work_unit, queue, attempt, delivery, and recovery surfaces are diagnostic refs only.
default_projection_policy.opl_handoff: Consume action_id and idempotency_key. Return TransitionReceipt; do not decide stage completion.
default_projection_policy.submission_ready_owner_receipt: An owner_receipt with package_kind=submission_ready_package, can_submit=true, quality_gate_status clear/passed/cleared, current/fresh/synced delivery projection, existing package root and zip, and no known blockers resolves to mission.complete. Bare owner_receipt, missing/stale package evidence, or blocked package evidence never resolves to mission.complete.
